projects-subtitle: From innovative micro-products to enterprise ecosystems
anima-description: A comprehensive microservices-based SaaS and On-premise platform transforming hybrid work environments through intelligent space management, real-time analytics, and automation.
anima-components: Platform Components: Booking system • Service Desk • Social modules • Engineering systems control • Multimedia management • Mobile applications (iOS/Android) • Web app • Admin panel
anima-challenge-text: To develop an enterprise-grade platform that optimizes office space utilization for hybrid work models, integrating multiple engineering systems and providing data-driven insights for large corporations.
anima-challenge1: 40%+ daily office space vacancy reduction challenge
anima-challenge2: Integration of disparate systems: HVAC, lighting, access control
anima-role1: End-to-end project leadership from concept to deployment
anima-role7: Integration coordination with corporate systems (Bitrix24, Active Directory, Microsoft Exchange, etc.)
anima-role9: Create product monetization strategy and financial modeling
anima-outcome1: Achieved MVP in 7 months under tight deadlines
anima-outcome2: Inclusion of software in the register of Russia software, which allowed for the receipt of benefits and grants
anima-outcome3: Closed enterprise sales to major commercial companies
anima-outcome4: Built and scaled core team from 1 to 5 key specialists
anima-outcome5: Developed monetization strategy and financial models
anima-outcome6: Implemented Agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban), transforming the development process into a flexible cycle
mood-description: An interactive exhibition application that captures and visualizes participant emotions in real-time, demonstrating innovative approach to user engagement and experience analytics.
mood-challenge-text: Create an engaging, lightweight app for a corporate trade show to visualize visitors emotions and showcase the power of real-time data visualization using engineering systems and multimedia.
mood-role1: Concept development: From idea to functional prototype
mood-role2: UI/UX: Сreated the concept of mood selection interface and real-time visualization
mood-role4: Exhibition deployment: Coordinated installation and technical support
mood-role5: Analytics: Technical specifications for real-time mood tracking analytics and visualization
mood-role6: Stakeholder presentations: Demonstrated product value to investors and clients
mood-outcome-text: A successful exhibition installation that engaged 500+ visitors, provided real-time mood analytics, demonstrated technical capabilities to potential clients, and generated leads for the main Anima platform.
skills-subtitle: Combination of technical expertise and a deep understanding of user experience
